question: How many customers do not have an order?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Customers WHERE customer_id NOT IN (SELECT customer_id FROM Customer_Orders);

back_translation.intent: 统计未在Customer_Orders表中出现的客户数量
filters: customer_id NOT IN (SELECT customer_id FROM Customer_Orders)

semantic.reason: 语义完全一致，SQL反向翻译描述准确表达了原始问题'How many customers do not have an order?'的意图，即统计没有订单的客户数量，使用了正确的过滤条件和聚合函数。
